title: GlyphPacksConfig
description: config/glyphpacks.json - human-authored labels for glyph pack values (labels only; the file/slug wiring is the generated GlyphManifest at frontend/public/assets/glyphs/index.json). Each pack maps a slug to its display label. Packs and slugs are open-ended (drop a new pack folder + a label row). Human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6).

evolution.change: Initial machine-checkable formalization of config/glyphpacks.json: { <pack> -> { <slug> -> { label } } }.
evolution.why: The pack label source must be schema-validated so a malformed or label-less entry fails fast (CLAUDE.md #6); packs/slugs stay open so a new collection needs only a label row.
